title: Facebook Marketplace Meetup
scene: 你在网上买了二手书桌，和卖家约在停车场面交。

turns.cn: 嗨，你是买书桌的张伟吗？
turns.en: Hi, are you Zhang Wei buying the desk?
Yes. Can I take a look first?

turns.cn: 当然，有一个抽屉拉不太顺。
turns.en: Sure. One drawer sticks a little.

turns.cn: 还行，八十块现金可以吗？
turns.en: It's okay. Would you take eighty cash?
I listed it at ninety. How about eighty-five?
Deal. My car is right over there.
I'll help you load it.

title: Item Not as Described
scene: 面交时发现商品和描述不符，你和卖家交涉。

turns.cn: 你说几乎全新，但屏幕有很大划痕。
turns.en: You said like new, but the screen has a big scratch.
I didn't notice in the photos. Sorry.

turns.cn: 五十块吧，不然我不买了。
turns.en: Fifty dollars, or I'll pass.
Sixty is my minimum. It's already a steal.
Fifty-five cash right now.
Fine.

turns.cn: 谢谢，以后描述写清楚些。
turns.en: Thanks. Please be more accurate next time.

title: Safety When Meeting
scene: 你卖手机，和买家约在警察局门口交易。

turns.cn: 约在这安全吗？我头一次面交。
turns.en: Is it safe to meet here? It's my first time.

turns.cn: 警察局门口最安全，白天人多。
turns.en: Police station parking is safest. Lots of people in daylight.
Can you turn it on so I can check it?

turns.cn: 当然，账号已退出，外观视频里都有。
turns.en: Sure. Accounts are logged out. The video shows the condition.
Okay. Three hundred cash.
Count it please. Nice doing business.
Thank you!

title: Posting an Item Online
scene: 你帮朋友写英文卖二手自行车的帖子。

turns.en: What should the title say?
Giant mountain bike, like new, two fifty.
What goes in the description?

turns.cn: 尺寸、去年买的、可试骑、现金面交。
turns.en: Size, bought last year, test ride welcome, cash only.
Where should we meet?

turns.cn: 家门口超市停车场，白天。
turns.en: Supermarket parking lot near my place, daytime.
Okay, it's posted.

title: Shipping Instead of Meetup
scene: 买家在外地，你协商邮寄二手相机。

turns.en: Can you ship it? I'm in another state.

turns.cn: 可以，运费你出，大概十五块。
turns.en: Yes, you pay shipping, about fifteen dollars.
Can you video the packing?

turns.cn: 可以，付款后当天寄，给追踪号。
turns.en: Sure. I'll ship same day after payment with tracking.
PayPal friends and family okay?
I'll ship after payment clears. No returns.
Got it. I'll pay now.
